Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 51 

QTY_PRSCRBD_NUM 

LABEL: Quantity Prescribed — for Schedule II Drugs 

DESCRIPTION: This field indicates the number of units, grams, milliliters, or other quantity prescribed if the current 
drug event is for a Schedule II drug. 

SHORT NAME: QTY_PRSCRBD_NUM 

LONG NAME: QTY_PRSCRBD_NUM 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: PDE 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: The
